caption: A woman is seen in a close-up shot, positioned in front of a light-colored wall with a yellow curtain to her left and a flat surface behind her. She wears a purple and white striped collared shirt and black over-the-ear headphones with a microphone. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the lower-left corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, she is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting slightly. In the final frame, she appears to be in the middle of a word, with her mouth open and her gaze directed toward the camera. The lighting remains consistent throughout, and the background remains stationary while only the woman's facial movements change.
